name: Lucas
meaning: Light - Bringer of light - From Lucania - Man of light
description: A radiant and luminous name derived from the Latin verb 'lucere' meaning to shine, a perennial favorite at the top of French charts. It carries the gentle strength of the evangelist Saint Luke, the patron saint of artists and physicians. Lucas is a name of bright intellect and clarity, suggesting a person who is a natural source of inspiration and illuminating warmth.

name: Emma
description: A timeless and beloved classic of Germanic origin, meaning whole or universal, a name that has consistently reigned as a top choice for girls in France. It carries a quiet strength and a sense of completeness, made famous by the noble Queen Emma of Normandy. Emma is a name of graceful solidity, suggesting a person who is balanced, kind, and possesses a universally appealing warmth and integrity.

name: Gabriel
meaning: God is my strength - Strong man of God - Hero of God
description: A powerful and deeply traditional name of Hebrew origin, borne by the archangel who serves as a divine messenger in Abrahamic traditions. It conveys a sense of immense spiritual strength, faithful service, and heavenly protection. Gabriel is a name of noble and enduring strength, suggesting a person who is a faithful herald, a strong protector, and a soul of divine, artistic, and gentle power.

name: Jade
meaning: Precious green stone - Stone of the flank
description: A chic and modern name, directly inspired by the beautiful, ornamental green gemstone prized for its beauty and protective qualities. It derives from the Spanish 'piedra de la ijada', believed to cure kidney ailments, adding a layer of ancient mystique. Jade is a name of striking elegance, suggesting a person of cool, poised beauty, a precious jewel of unique charm, and a soul of serene, strong, and vibrant energy.

name: Louis
meaning: Famous warrior - Renowned fighter - Loud in battle
description: A name of immense royal prestige and timeless elegance, the French form of the Frankish name Chlodowig, meaning famous warrior. Borne by eighteen kings of France, it carries a regal and powerful legacy, a classic choice for centuries. Louis is a name of dignified strength, suggesting a person of noble bearing, a natural leader, and a soul of historical depth, courage, and enduring, quiet authority.

name: Louise
description: The elegant and strong feminine form of Louis, sharing the same Germanic roots meaning renowned warrior, a beloved classic in France. It has a timeless, sturdy charm, often seen as competent, studious, and quietly efficient, yet possessing a gentle strength. Louise is a name of understated power, suggesting a person who is a capable leader, a true friend, and a soul of graceful, resilient, and quietly formidable character.

name: Hugo
description: A name of intelligent and creative energy, the Old French form of the Germanic 'Hugo', meaning mind or spirit, famously borne by the great French writer Victor Hugo. It has a strong, artistic feel, suggesting a person of deep thought, wit, and imaginative power. Hugo is a name of sharp intellect, suggesting a person who is a thinker, a creator, and a soul of brilliant, spirited, and artistic genius.

name: Chloé
description: A fresh and vibrant name of Greek origin, meaning a young, green shoot of a plant, symbolizing new growth and youthful energy. It is the French form of Chloe, a popular name that evokes the verdant beauty of springtime and nature. Chloé is a name of lively grace, suggesting a person who is full of life, a symbol of blooming youth, and a soul of fresh, vibrant, and naturally beautiful, verdant charm.

name: Nathan
description: A strong and classic name of Hebrew origin, meaning gift from God or he gave, a name of biblical depth from the Old Testament prophet in King David's court. It is a widely loved name in France, appreciated for its solid, dependable, and generous feel. Nathan is a name of giving strength, suggesting a person who is a true blessing, a faithful soul, and a spirit of generous, reliable, and deeply principled character.

name: Manon
meaning: Bitter - Wished-for child - Beloved - Star of the sea
description: An endearing and quintessentially French name, a sweet pet form of Marie, carrying the layered meanings of bitterness and beloved, a wished-for child. It has a charming, slightly mischievous quality, famously associated with the tragic heroine of the novel 'Manon Lescaut'. Manon is a name of folk grace, suggesting a person of spirited charm, a sweet, beloved soul, and a uniquely French, endearing, and timelessly classic character.

name: Théo
description: A short, stylish, and trendy name of Greek origin, derived from Theodōros, meaning gift of God, a popular and modern abbreviation in France. It has a bright, friendly, and divine feel, a beloved choice for its sweet simplicity and profound meaning. Théo is a name of divine grace, suggesting a person who is a precious gift, a bright, happy soul, and a spirit of joyful, beloved, and spiritually blessed character.

name: Camille
meaning: Helper to the priest - Attendant at a religious ceremony - Young ceremonial attendant
description: An elegant and literary name of Latin origin, from the name Camillus, meaning a young attendant at religious rituals, a timeless unisex classic in France. It is sophisticated and intellectual, a name of quiet charm and historical depth. Camille is a name of serving grace, suggesting a person of elegant strength, a faithful helper, and a soul of dignified, classic, and quietly intellectual character.

name: Maël
description: A mystical and ancient name of Breton origin, derived from a Celtic word for prince or chieftain, a powerful and modern favorite in France. It carries a strong, noble, and distinctly Celtic feel, a name of leadership and mythical depth. Maël is a name of princely strength, suggesting a person who is a born leader, a noble chief, and a soul of ancient, powerful, and uniquely Celtic, lordly character.

name: Inès
description: A beautiful and pure name of Spanish and Portuguese origin, a variant of Agnes, meaning chaste or holy, very popular in modern France. It carries a sense of virtue, grace, and a pure, sacred heart, a name of deep spiritual resonance and elegant sound. Inès is a name of holy grace, suggesting a person of pure virtue, a sacred soul, and a spirit of chaste, beautiful, and gracefully faithful character.

name: Léon
description: A vintage and brave name of Greek and Latin origin, meaning lion, the king of the animals, a name returning to favor in France. It inspires a sense of power, courage, and regal nobility, a name of simple, fierce strength. Léon is a name of lion-hearted strength, suggesting a person of immense courage, a natural leader, and a soul of brave, powerful, and kingly, majestic character.

name: Léna
meaning: Light - Torch - Sun ray - Shining light
description: A short, radiant, and international name, often used as a short form of Helena or Magdalena, carrying the beautiful meaning of light and illumination. It has a bright, soft, and luminous feel, a popular choice for its delicate, global charm. Léna is a name of shining grace, suggesting a person of bright light, a soft, illuminating soul, and a spirit of radiant, gentle, and beautifully luminous, tender character.

name: Raphaël
description: A romantic and artistic name of Hebrew origin, meaning God has healed, borne by the archangel Raphael, the patron saint of healing and travelers. It is a powerful cross-cultural name, suggesting a person of gentle strength, creativity, and a divine healing touch. Raphaël is a name of healing grace, suggesting a person of artistic soul, a gentle healer, and a spirit of creative, angelic, and powerfully gentle character.

name: Margaux
description: A chic and wine-inspired spelling of Margot, a French diminutive of Margaret, meaning pearl, famously chosen by a supermodel after a bottle of Bordeaux. It has a stylish, modern, and slightly bohemian feel, a name of unique elegance. Margaux is a name of beautiful grace, suggesting a person of precious value, a pearl of great beauty, and a spirit of chic, unique, and sparklingly elegant, charming character.

name: Arthur
description: A legendary and noble name of Celtic origin, perhaps meaning bear king or a Roman clan name, forever linked to the mythic King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table. It is a name of heroic strength and chivalric romance. Arthur is a name of legendary strength, suggesting a person of noble courage, a natural leader, and a soul of heroic, chivalrous, and classically kingly character.

name: Juliette
description: A romantic and literary name, the French diminutive of Julia, meaning youthful, forever immortalized as Shakespeare's tragic heroine in 'Romeo and Juliet'. It has a delicate, passionate, and star-crossed feel. Juliette is a name of young grace, suggesting a person of eternal youth, a romantic spirit, and a soul of passionate, beautiful, and timelessly youthful, literary charm.

name: Antoine
description: A venerable and distinguished French name, a variation of the Latin name Antonius, meaning highly praiseworthy or priceless. It is a classic, saintly name with a sophisticated edge, a popular choice in France for generations. Antoine is a name of priceless strength, suggesting a person of great value, a distinguished soul, and a spirit of classic, intelligent, and highly admirable, noble character.

name: Mathilde
meaning: Mighty in battle - Strength in battle - Battle-mighty
description: A strong and vintage name of Germanic origin, composed of the elements 'maht' meaning power and 'hild' meaning battle, a powerful and royal name. It has a sturdy, intellectual, and historically rich feel, a hipster favorite. Mathilde is a name of mighty grace, suggesting a person of great inner strength, a warrior spirit, and a soul of powerful, intelligent, and battle-ready, noble character.

name: Clément
description: A kind and gentle name of Latin origin, meaning merciful or mild, a classic name with a soft, virtuous, and papal history, borne by several popes. It suggests a person of forgiving nature, a peaceful soul, and a character of quiet, compassionate strength. Clément is a name of merciful grace, suggesting a person of gentle kindness, a forgiving soul, and a spirit of mild, merciful, and peacefully strong, kind character.

name: Amandine
description: A delicate and sweet name, the French diminutive of Amanda, from the Latin 'amanda' meaning she who must be loved, a name of affection and charm. It has a soft, floral feel, like the almond dessert, a name of gentle endearment. Amandine is a name of lovable grace, suggesting a person of sweet affection, a much-loved soul, and a spirit of gentle, charming, and endearingly lovable, kind character.

name: Baptiste
meaning: Baptizer - One who baptizes - To dip
description: A devout and pure name, derived from the Greek 'bapto', meaning to dip, traditionally given in honor of John the Baptist, a popular saint's name. It has a strong, religious, and classical feel, a name of deep faith and dedication. Baptiste is a name of devout strength, suggesting a person of pure faith, a dedicated soul, and a spirit of holy, baptizing, and faithfully strong, pure character.

name: Anaïs
description: An exotic and graceful name of uncertain origin, likely a Provençal form of Anna, meaning grace, a name with a distinctly artistic and sophisticated flair. It has a flowing, beautiful sound, a popular choice for its unique, elegant charm. Anaïs is a name of graceful charm, suggesting a person of divine favor, an artistic soul, and a spirit of elegant, undefiled, and beautifully gracious, mystical character.

name: Maxime
description: A grand and ambitious name of Latin origin, derived from 'Maximus', meaning the greatest, a unisex name in France used predominantly for boys. It carries a sense of excellence, achievement, and distinction. Maxime is a name of great strength, suggesting a person of highest ambition, a greatest soul, and a spirit of grand, successful, and ambitiously great, distinguished character.

name: Océane
description: A beautiful and nature-inspired name, derived directly from the French word for ocean, a modern and elegant choice, popular in France and Quebec. It evokes the vastness, depth, and mystery of the sea, a fresh, summery feel. Océane is a name of deep grace, suggesting a person of oceanic depth, a vast, free spirit, and a soul of deep, flowing, and beautifully mysterious, maritime charm.

name: Alexandre
meaning: Defender of mankind - Protector of men - Warrior
description: The heroic French form of Alexander, a name of immense historical power, from the Greek 'Alexandros', meaning defender of mankind. It is a powerful and classic choice, associated with the great conqueror Alexander the Great. Alexandre is a name of heroic strength, suggesting a person of great courage, a protector of the people, and a soul of powerful, defending, and classically heroic, mighty character.

description: A timeless and noble name of Hebrew origin, meaning princess or lady, borne by the biblical matriarch and wife of Abraham, a name of deep faith and dignity. Sarah is a name of royal grace, suggesting a person of noble bearing, a true princess in spirit, and a soul of dignified, faithful, and beautifully noble, regal character.

name: Nicolas
meaning: Victory of the people - People's victory
description: A widespread and classic name of Greek origin, meaning victory of the people, famously associated with Saint Nicholas, the generous and festive figure who inspired Santa Claus. name: Élodie

description: A melodic and vintage name of Gothic origin, possibly meaning foreign riches, a name that has come back into style in France, elegant and lyrical. It has a soft, flowing sound, a name of subtle strength and exotic charm. Élodie is a name of rich grace, suggesting a person of unique value, a wealthy foreign spirit, and a soul of melodic, elegant, and distinctively beautiful, foreign charm.

Valentin is a name of strong health, suggesting a person of great vigor, a loving soul, and a spirit of strong, worthy, and romantically robust, healthy character.

name: Lucie

Lucie is a name of bright grace, suggesting a person of pure light, a bringer of illumination, and a soul of luminous, classic, and beautifully shining, hopeful character.

name: Quentin

Quentin is a name of strong order, suggesting a person of steadfast faith, a numbered soul, and a spirit of saintly, classic, and uniquely fifth-born, strong character.

name: Pauline

It has a quiet strength, a name of modesty and simplicity. Pauline is a name of humble grace, suggesting a person of quiet modesty, a small, kind soul, and a spirit of gentle, devout, and sweetly humble, little character.

name: Adrien

description: A sophisticated and darkly handsome name, the French variation of Adrian, from the Latin 'Hadrianus', meaning man from the port city of Adria. Adrien is a name of rich depth, suggesting a person of deep roots, a dark, handsome soul, and a spirit of sophisticated, strong, and mysteriously deep, elegant character.

name: Marine
description: A fresh and breezy maritime name, derived from the Latin 'marinus', meaning of the sea, a popular choice in France, evoking the ocean's purity and depth. Marine is a name of deep grace, suggesting a person of oceanic depth, a calm, pure soul, and a spirit of fresh, tranquil, and beautifully maritime, clear character.

name: Corentin
description: A strong and stormy name of Breton origin, perhaps meaning hurricane or tempest, a popular saint's name in France, known for its powerful, natural energy. Corentin is a name of tempestuous strength, suggesting a person of great energy, a friendly storm, and a soul of wild, hurricane-like, and powerfully unique, Breton character.

name: Coline
meaning: Victory of the people - Triumphant people - Little dove
description: A sweet and uncommon name, a feminine diminutive of Col (from Nicolas), meaning victory of the people, a soft, gentle name with a strong meaning. It has a delicate, pretty sound, a name of quiet triumph. Coline is a name of victorious grace, suggesting a person of gentle victory, a triumphant little soul, and a spirit of sweet, strong, and winningly delicate, victorious character.

name: Rémi

Rémi is a name of guiding strength, suggesting a person of healing presence, a skilled oarsman, and a soul of remeding, rowing, and faithfully guiding, historical character.

name: Émilie
description: A vibrant and classic name, the French feminine form of the Roman family name Aemilius, meaning rival or industrious, a popular and timeless choice. It has a strong, elegant, and intelligent feel, a name of graceful ambition. Émilie is a name of strong grace, suggesting a person of eager industry, a beautiful rival, and a soul of vibrant, intelligent, and beautifully industrious, classic character.

name: Florian
description: A prosperous and blossoming name, from the Roman name Florianus, derived from 'flos', meaning flower, the patron saint of firefighters and chimney sweeps. It has a strong, blooming, and protective feel. Florian is a name of flowering strength, suggesting a person of great growth, a blossoming soul, and a spirit of prosperous, flowering, and protectively strong, flourishing character.

name: Mélanie
description: A mysterious and elegant name of Greek origin, from 'melania', meaning black or dark, a name with a sophisticated, deep, and slightly gothic feel. It has a beautiful, classic sound, a name of profound depth and secret strength. Mélanie is a name of dark grace, suggesting a person of hidden depth, a beautiful, dark soul, and a spirit of mysterious, elegant, and deeply profound, beautiful darkness.

name: Kévin

description: A name of Irish origin, a popular French variant of Kevin, from 'Caoimhín', meaning handsome or kind, extremely popular in France in the 80s and 90s. Kévin is a name of handsome grace, suggesting a person of gentle birth, a kind soul, and a spirit of handsome, friendly, and warmly kind, popular character.

name: Laura

Laura is a name of victorious grace, suggesting a person of crowned honor, a sweet, classic soul, and a spirit of laureled, timeless, and quietly victorious, elegant character.

name: Jérémy

Jérémy is a name of uplifting strength, suggesting a person of divine exaltation, a hopeful soul, and a spirit of uplifting, faithful, and classically strong, prophetic character.

name: Marion

Marion is a name of beloved grace, suggesting a person of starry guidance, a wished-for child, and a soul of charming, beloved, and sweetly nostalgic, folk character.

name: Dylan

It has a creative, artistic, and strong feel. Dylan is a name of flowing strength, suggesting a person of deep waves, a creative soul, and a spirit of fluid, artistic, and greatly tidal, deep character.

name: Morgane

Morgane is a name of magical grace, suggesting a person of enchanting power, a sea-born sorceress, and a soul of mystical, bright, and powerfully magical, sea-circle character.

name: Benjamin

name: Céline

name: David

David is a name of beloved strength, suggesting a person of a beloved heart, a poet warrior, and a soul of faithful, courageous, and deeply beloved, darling character.

name: Audrey

name: Élodie

description: A sleek and chic name of Greek origin, meaning woman from Delphi, the 'navel of the earth', home of the famous oracle, a name of mystical depth and oceanic intelligence. It has a sophisticated, ancient, and intelligent feel. Delphine is a name of oracular grace, suggesting a person of deep wisdom, a dolphin's intelligence, and a soul of mystical, chic, and ancient, earth-navel, mysterious character.

name: Christian
description: A devout name of Latin origin, from 'Christianus', meaning a follower of Christ, a name of deep faith, widespread use, and strong religious identity. It has a strong, classic, and faithful feel. Christian is a name of faithful strength, suggesting a person of Christ-like devotion, a believer soul, and a spirit of strong, devout, and faithfully Christian, religious character.

name: Valérie
description: A vibrant and robust name, the French form of Valeria, from the Latin 'valere', meaning to be strong, a name of great health, courage, and powerful elegance. It has a strong, beautiful, and classic feel. Valérie is a name of strong grace, suggesting a person of great strength, a healthy, brave soul, and a spirit of valiant, robust, and beautifully strong, courageous character.

name: Michel
description: A humble and mighty name of Hebrew origin, the French form of Michael, meaning 'Who is like God?', a name of archangelic strength, spiritual power, and faithful devotion. It has a strong, classic, and deeply religious feel. Michel is a name of godly strength, suggesting a person of divine questioning, a mighty archangel, and a soul of strong, faithful, and humbly mighty, heavenly character.

name: Brigitte
meaning: Exalted one - Strength - High and powerful
description: A name of Celtic goddess origins, meaning exalted one or strength, the French form of the Irish name Brighid, a name of luminous, powerful, and vintage glamour. It has a strong, classic, and distinctly French feel. Brigitte is a name of exalted grace, suggesting a person of great strength, a powerful, luminous soul, and a spirit of exalted, strong, and vintage, goddess-like, powerful character.

name: Jean
description: A classic and humble name of Hebrew origin, the French form of John, meaning God is gracious, a name of immense simplicity, faith, and enduring, traditional strength. It has a classic, strong, and faithful feel. Jean is a name of gracious strength, suggesting a person of divine grace, a humble, kind soul, and a spirit of classic, faithful, and graciously simple, beloved character.

name: Marie
meaning: Star of the sea - Beloved - Wished-for child
description: A pure and beloved name, the French form of Mary, meaning star of the sea or beloved, a name of deep faith, maternal love, and timeless, sacred elegance. It has a classic, beautiful, and universally revered feel. Marie is a name of starry grace, suggesting a person of the sea star, a beloved mother, and a soul of pure, faithful, and beautifully starry, wished-for character.

name: Jacques
description: A classic and historical name, the French form of James or Jacob, meaning supplanter, a name of ancient, biblical strength, and a pilgrim's spirit. It has a strong, classic, and distinctly French feel. Jacques is a name of supplanting strength, suggesting a person of faithful following, a pilgrim soul, and a spirit of classic, strong, and deeply historical, Jacob-like character.

name: Hélène
meaning: Torch - Light - Sun ray - Shining one
description: A radiant and classical name, the French form of Helen, meaning torch or light, a name of ancient, mythological beauty, and a bright, shining, sun-like elegance. It has a strong, beautiful, and classically radiant feel. Hélène is a name of torchlight grace, suggesting a person of bright light, a beautiful, shining soul, and a spirit of radiant, classical, and beautifully torch-lit, sun ray character.

name: Gérard
meaning: Brave spear - Strong with the spear
description: A bold and old-style name of Germanic origin, from 'Gerhard', meaning brave with the spear, a name of strong, hardy, and distinctly old-fashioned, warrior strength. It has a strong, classic, and slightly retro feel. Gérard is a name of spearing strength, suggesting a person of brave heart, a strong warrior, and a soul of bold, old-style, and bravely spearing, hardy character.

name: Françoise
description: A dignified and classic name, the French feminine form of François, meaning free one or Frenchwoman, a name of patriotic elegance, strong, free spirit, and a distinctly French identity. It has a classic, strong, and beautifully French feel. Françoise is a name of free grace, suggesting a person of French spirit, a free soul, and a spirit of dignified, classic, and beautifully free, Frenchwoman character.

name: Patrick
description: A noble and classic name of Latin origin, from 'Patricius', meaning noble, a name of patrician strength, widely used in France, though strongly associated with the Irish saint. It has a strong, classic, and noble feel. Patrick is a name of noble strength, suggesting a person of patrician class, a noble soul, and a spirit of classic, strong, and nobly patrician, virtuous character.

name: Claudine
description: An intellectual and vintage name, the French feminine diminutive of Claude, from the Latin 'Claudius', meaning lame, a name made famous by the novels of French writer Colette. It has a classic, literary, and slightly retro feel. Claudine is a name of vintage grace, suggesting a person of intellectual charm, a literary soul, and a spirit of classic, Colette-like, and vintage, feminine, strong character.

name: Bernard
meaning: Brave as a bear - Strong as a bear
description: A strong and protective name of Germanic origin, from 'Bernhard', meaning brave as a bear, a name of saintly strength, known for the Saint Bernard dogs, a symbol of rescue. It has a strong, classic, and hardy feel. Bernard is a name of bear-strength, suggesting a person of brave heart, a strong, protective soul, and a spirit of hardy, brave, and bear-like, strong, protective character.

name: Monique
description: A wise and maternal name, the French form of Monica, meaning advisor or alone, a name of sage, steady, and spiritual guidance, associated with Saint Monica, the mother of Saint Augustine. It has a classic, strong, and wise feel. Monique is a name of advising grace, suggesting a person of great wisdom, a patient, spiritual soul, and a spirit of sage, steady, and wisely advising, maternal character.

name: Roger
description: A renowned and classic name of Germanic origin, from 'Hrodger', meaning famous with the spear, a name of strong, warrior strength, introduced to England by the Normans. It has a strong, classic, and hardy feel. Roger is a name of famous strength, suggesting a person of renowned fame, a spearman soul, and a spirit of classic, strong, and famously spearing, warrior character.

name: Yvette
description: A name of natural elegance, the French feminine form of Yves, meaning yew tree, a name of botanical, delicate, and strong, yew-wood strength, used for archery bows. It has a soft, elegant, and botanical feel. Yvette is a name of yew-tree grace, suggesting a person of natural strength, an archer's soul, and a spirit of delicate, strong, and beautifully yew-wood, archer character.

name: Marcel
meaning: Young warrior - Little warrior - Dedicated to Mars
description: A small but fierce name of Latin origin, from 'Marcellus', meaning little warrior, a name of ancient, dedicated strength, associated with the Roman god of war, Mars. It has a strong, classic, and slightly retro feel. Marcel is a name of warrior strength, suggesting a person of Mars' devotion, a little warrior, and a soul of small, fierce, and classically war-like, dedicated character.

name: Gisèle
description: A name of noble promise, of Germanic origin, meaning pledge or hostage, a name of vintage, elegant, and gracefully strong, ballet-inspired charm, from the famous ballet 'Giselle'. It has a soft, classic, and graceful feel. Gisèle is a name of pledged grace, suggesting a person of noble promise, a graceful soul, and a spirit of elegant, ballet-like, and beautifully pledged, classic charm.

name: Alain
description: A steady and charming name of Breton origin, meaning handsome or harmony, a name of classic, mid-century, French charm, famously borne by the actor Alain Delon. It has a strong, handsome, and distinctly French feel. Alain is a name of handsome strength, suggesting a person of great harmony, a little rock, and a spirit of classic, charming, and steadily handsome, Breton character.

name: Corinne
description: An artistic and refined name of Greek origin, meaning beautiful maiden, a name popularized by the novel 'Corinne, or Italy' by Madame de Staël, a name of literary grace. It has a soft, classic, and artistic feel. Corinne is a name of maiden grace, suggesting a person of beautiful youth, an artistic soul, and a spirit of literary, refined, and beautifully maiden-like, classic charm.

name: Raoul
description: A wise and fierce name of Germanic origin, from 'Radulf', meaning wolf counsel, the French form of Ralph, a name of strong, ancient, and distinctly wolf-like, advisory strength. It has a strong, classic, and slightly fierce feel. Raoul is a name of wolf-strength, suggesting a person of wise counsel, a fierce advisor, and a soul of strong, wolf-counseled, and ancient, fierce, wise character.

name: Solange
meaning: Solemn - Religious - Angel of the sun
description: A serene and devout name of Latin origin, meaning solemn or religious, a name of quiet, saintly strength, associated with a 9th-century shepherdess saint. It has a soft, classic, and spiritual feel. Solange is a name of solemn grace, suggesting a person of religious devotion, a sun angel, and a spirit of serene, devout, and quietly solemn, saintly character.

name: Gilles
description: A protective and gentle name of Latin origin, from 'Aegidius', meaning shield bearer or young goat, a name of medieval, hermit-like strength, associated with a 7th-century hermit saint. It has a strong, classic, and unique feel. Gilles is a name of shielding strength, suggesting a person of young goat spirit, a shield bearer, and a soul of protective, gentle, and medieval, hermit-like, strong character.

name: Marguerite
description: A classic and pure name of Greek origin, meaning pearl or daisy, the French source of the name Margaret, a name of floral, elegant, and beautifully simple, pearl-like purity. It has a classic, beautiful, and distinctly French feel. Marguerite is a name of pearl-grace, suggesting a person of daisy beauty, a precious pearl, and a soul of classic, pure, and beautifully pearl-like, floral, elegant charm.
